:robot_face: *[FLEX AGENT] Weekly Friday — week ending 2026-05-01*
_Draft week-in-review. Review, edit, publish to #product-cleo-card when ready._

*Shipped this week*

• Push Marqeta to expedite the sandbox access — Jago — closed Fri
• Chase Legal's analysis on Flex Card product classification — Jago — closed this week
• Set up weekly 3-way recurring (Jago + Ladi + Lea) on WebBank + Marqeta — Ladi — closed Wed
• WebBank to confirm BSA / Reg E / Reg DD / Reg CC drop-offs after FCC scoping — WebBank — closed Fri
• WebBank to apply P1/P2/P3 priority ratings across implementation checklist — WebBank — closed Fri
(+8 more: templates received, bureau follow-up scheduled, NACHA clarification posted, Jared email sent, plastics milestones updated, checklist tagging, analytics items reviewed, abridged doc WB comments knocked out)

─────────────────────────

*Slipped this week*

• Marqeta to confirm 14 May sandbox includes reporting-layer (Decoda) access — (awaiting Marqeta) — was due 2026-05-01 — 0 days
• Marqeta to confirm pricing on user creation + active account definitions — (awaiting Marqeta) — was due 2026-05-01 — 0 days
• Marqeta to confirm Mastercard's position on BNPL-as-primary credential — (awaiting Marqeta) — was due 2026-05-01 — 0 days

─────────────────────────
